---
title: "Hi, I'm Tyler"
image: "Tyler.jpg"
links:
  - label: Data Blog
    url: "https://tylerjtran.github.io/data_blog/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/tylerjtran"
  - label: Miniatures
    url: "./miniatures.html"
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/tylerjtran/"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:tylerjtran@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 
I like using data to effect positive change. I specialize in creating data products that make information more open and accessible, helping people and businesses make clearer decisions. I have experience working in government, non-profits, and academia. Click any of the links below to learn more about me. 


<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-0R71Q3SVVR"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());

  gtag('config', 'G-0R71Q3SVVR');
</script>
